name: Salmon and Brown Rice Bake
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. In a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish, combine corn, salmon, uncooked rice, water, green onions, chicken broth granules and dill weed. Cover and bake for 30 minutes or until rice is tender. Sprinkle with cheese. Bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes or until cheese melts.
